LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOSE CANALES' MOTION TO VACATE AND SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND TO QUASH ANY WRITS OF EXECUTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ARE VACATED. MR. CANALES MUST FILE HIS ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 18, 2017. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: REYES F. HUNTER, CSR#6576, RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG. (302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Default Judgment And To Quash Any Writs Of Execution
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James A. Michel, Esq., Tel. 415.239.4949, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT JOSE CANALES' Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Default Judgment And To Quash Any Writs Of Execution. Defendant Jose Canales' motion to vacate and set aside default judgment and to quash any writs of execution is granted. No opposition filed. The default and default judgment are vacated. Mr. Canales must file his answer to the complaint no later than September 18, 2017. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, rhunter@sftc.org.
